name: Saasu API
description: Saasu is a fast, simple online accounting platform for small businesses. The REST API provides access to accounts, activities, attachments, companies, contacts, invoices, items, journals, payments, payroll, reports, search, settings, and user management. Supports JSON and XML formats.
